gaps.description: Core single-function ask() API with multi-round tool loop is fully implemented
file_read / file_write via agentic-filesystem (browser virtual FS) is implemented
code_exec uses AsyncFunction — browser-compatible, no Node deps
Anthropic and OpenAI provider adapters with custom provider fallback are implemented
Zero framework concepts (no chain/graph/memory) — minimal API surface maintained
shell_exec uses Node.js child_process — not browser-compatible, conflicts with browser-first vision
No default browser filesystem out of the box — users must pass AgenticFileSystem manually, violating zero-config promise
Search tool requires external API key (Tavily/Serper) with no zero-config fallback for browser use
